subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the Book and made it a proof from His presence unto all who are in the heavens and on the earth. Verily, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الکتاب و جعله حجه من عنده لمن فی السموات و الارضین انه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @purpose; goal of creation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
